title: Territory Manager - Emilia Romagna
description:
Job Description
You’re an important part of our future. Hopefully, we're also a part of your future! At B. Braun, we protect and improve the health of people worldwide. You support this vision, bringing expertise and sharing innovation, efficiency and sustainability as values. That’s why we would like to keep developing our company with you. Keeping your future in mind, we’re making a joint contribution to health care worldwide, with trust, transparency and appreciation. That's Sharing Expertise.


Territory Manager \- Emilia Romagna
Company: B. Braun Milano S.p.A.
Job Posting Location: Mirandola, Emilia Romagna, Italia
Functional Area: Sales
Working Model: Remote
Requisition ID: 11193
**Descrizione del ruolo**

Per la Business Unit Surgery, il Territory Manager coordinerà l’intero processo di vendita e promozione delle soluzioni chirurgiche B. Braun, nello specifico delle linee MIS (Mini Invasive Surgery) e ORS (Operative Room Supply \- sutures \& hemostatics), garantendo il raggiungimento degli obiettivi di fatturato e il pieno supporto ai clienti nella regione **Emilia Romagna.**

In particolare, il ruolo include:


* Promozione commerciale attiva e continua negli ospedali assegnati
* Gestione dei rapporti con i Key Opinion Leader clinici e amministrativi delle strutture di competenza
* Gestione delle offerte e decodifica dei capitolati di gara in collaborazione con il Regional Sales Manager (RSM)
* Sviluppo delle gare aggiudicate e monitoraggio delle performance di vendita
* Assistenza, demo e formazione in sala operatoria per il personale medico e infermieristico
* Partecipazione a workshop, congressi e iniziative clinico\-tecniche su indicazione del Business Unit Manager (BUM) o RSM
* È responsabile della corretta e periodica compilazione su CRM (Salesforce/ALEXIS) e di analisi dei risultati commerciali;
* Elaborazione di analisi dati di mercato relativamente al trend di vendita e sviluppo del territorio di competenza, analisi della concorrenza e delle dinamiche di mercato
* Gestione dei complaints da parte dei clienti sui prodotti e li trasferisce all’ufficio di riferimento secondo le procedure aziendali;
* Collaborazione continua con RSM e BUM per l’elaborazione di strategie commerciali
Rispetto delle linee guida aziendali e delle normative vigenti in materia di Compliance, 231 e sicurezza  
* 

**Requisiti vincolanti**

* Esperienza minima di 2 anni nelle vendite in ambito Medical Device, preferibilmente area chirurgica
* Spiccate doti relazionali e commerciali, con forte orientamento ai risultati
Ottima presenza, dialettica e capacità di comunicazione  
* 

**Competenze preferenziali**

* Formazione scientifica o tecnologica
* Esperienza maturata in ambito MedTech, preferibilmente ambito chirurgico
Conoscenza della gestione di dispositivi monouso e apparecchiature medicali  
* 

**Profilo ideale**

* Laurea in discipline scientifiche o comprovata esperienza in contesti chirurgici
* Residenza a Bologna / Romagna
* Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese
Padronanza di Office, Salesforce CRM/ALEXIS e gestionali per quotazioni  
* 

**Caratteristiche personali**

* Propensione al lavoro di squadra e senso di responsabilità
* Autonomia nella pianificazione delle attività
* Integrità morale, empatia e professionalità
* Precisione, puntualità, curiosità e desiderio di aggiornamento continuo
company_description: As one of the world's largest medical technology companies, through Sharing Expertise and the power of technology we drive advancements in healthcare.

title: MANUFACTURING ENGINEER
description:
**Lincotek,** headquartered in Rubbiano, Parma, Italy, is a global contract manufacturer for services in markets including Industrial Gas Turbines, Aerospace and Medical Device applications, as well as a leading manufacturer of industrial coating equipment and one of the most respected producers in the Additive Manufacturing field. The Group has more than 1,800 employees located in 18 production facilities across Europe, North America and Asia.

  

  

**Posizione:**
--------------

### **ABOUT THE JOB**


Under the direction of the Product Engineering Manager and functionally reporting to the Product Owner, the Manufacturing Engineer is responsible for ensuring technical aspects regarding the proper production on Special Processes (coating, drilling, heat treatment, etc.) for IGT (Industrial Gas Turbine) e Aviation components.

### **MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES:**


The Manufacturing Engineer, after a period of training, shall perform each of the Major Activities, including, but not limited to, the following:

* Layout the manufacturing process incorporating all aspects of product design criteria, including definition of process flows, manufacturing times, BOMs, operative and technical instructions. In particular, the process flow will be managed by using dedicated software (SAP).
* Provides constant support to production from an engineering standpoint in order to prevent and solve any issues to parts during the process flow.
* Collaborate with Quality dept on critical aspects regarding products and processes of proper OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer).
* Collect, analyze, and discuss customer required specifications and drawings
* Collaborate with Design team and Production to ensure manufacturability of items internally developed and designed
* Prepare required customer documentation to qualify new products/processes. Continuously improve product / processes and utilize proper change management practices.
* Other duties as assigned.

**SUPERVISORY RESPONSIBILITY:**
-------------------------------


None

**Requisiti:**
--------------

**EDUCATION AND/OR EXPERIENCE:**
--------------------------------

* Bachelor’s degree in engineering or any related field.
* Experience or knowledge in the IGT and Aviation business is a plus.
* Responsible for exhibiting professional behavior with both internal and external business associates that reflects positively on the company and is consistent with the company’s policies and practices.
* Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Office applications, including Word, Excel, PowerPoint
* Basic SAP knowledge is a plus.
* Knowledge of GD\&T (Geometric Dimensioning and Tolerancing) is a plus.

**SKILLS:**
-----------

**LANGUAGE SKILLS**

* Excellent communication skills, including well developed written, interpersonal, presentation and negotiation abilities.
* Ability to positively interact with all levels of internal collaborators as well as external customers or suppliers, including technical discussion.
* Excellent command of English, both written and spoken.
* Excellent command of Italian, both written and spoken.

**REASONING ABILITY**

* Ability to define problems, collect data, establish facts, and draw valid conclusions.
* Ability to interpret an extensive variety of technical instructions in mathematical or diagram form and deal with several abstract and concrete variables.

**Altre informazioni:**
-----------------------

**WORK ENVIRONMENT:**
---------------------


This job operates in both an office environment and a manufacturing environment. The role routinely uses standard office equipment, such as computers, phones, photocopiers, filing cabinets and fax machines. The individual will be required to adhere to safety policies and procedures on the manufacturing floor.

**PHYSICAL DEMAND:**
--------------------


While performing the duties of this job, the employee is regularly required to talk or hear. The employee is frequently required to stand, walk, use hands to finger, handle or feel and reach with hands and arms.

**POSITION TYPE/EXPECTED HOURS OF WORK:**
-----------------------------------------


This is a full\-time position, Monday through Friday 8am to 5pm, with additional hours as business needs necessitate.

**TRAVEL**
----------


Occasional overseas and domestic travel may be required to support the rapid growth of the company.

  

Lincotek provides equal employment opportunity to all individuals regardless of their race, color, creed, religion, gender, age, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by state, federal, or local law.

title: Purchasing Manager
description:
**Requistion ID**: 82762

  

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with over a century of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands.

  

Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality, and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dental care. Dentsply Sirona’s headquarter is located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY. Visit www.dentsplysirona.com for more information about Dentsply Sirona and its products.

**Purchasing Manager**
----------------------


The Purchasing Manager is part of the local Supply Chain team, reporting to the Site Director, and is responsible for activities related to the procurement of direct materials.

### **Responsibilities**

* Responsible for implementing the local sourcing strategy for the assigned suppliers (Class C), defining commercial terms and intervening directly when necessary.
* Supports Category Managers in commercial negotiations with Class A and B suppliers.
* Implements an operational cost reduction program within the scope of responsibility, with particular focus on:
	+ Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) analysis
	+ Inventory management costs
	+ Potential intra\-group purchasing synergies
	+ Supplier base rationalization, etc.
* Monitors warehouse status with regard to purchasing activities, ensuring compliance with the supply chain levels defined by company policy, and reports any potential critical issues to the Site Director.
* Collaborates with the Supplier Quality Engineering (Supplier QE) function in the qualification of new suppliers.
* Ensures full compliance with company policies and internal procedures.
* Participates in continuous improvement projects and Product Changes, supporting company functions in the development of new products or modifications to existing ones.
* Manages and develops the purchasing team, promoting skills growth and alignment with expected performance levels.
* Prepares reports, analyses, and presentations for management, including budgets and performance dashboards.

### **Requirements**

* University degree in Supply Chain or equivalent experience/knowledge.
* Fluent English proficiency.
* Good knowledge of Microsoft Office.
* Knowledge of SAP is considered a plus.
* Leadership and stakeholder management skills.
* Strong analytical mindset, attention to detail, and problem\-solving attitude.
* Ability to work in complex, dynamic, and international environments.
* Strong sense of responsibility, integrity, and confidentiality.
* Alignment with company values of Respect (for company standards, corporate vision, colleagues and customers, processes, and operating procedures), Responsibility, Collaboration, Reliability, and Agility (continuous improvement).


\#LI\-MB2

 **Equal Opportunity Employer:** Dentsply Sirona is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will be considered without unlawful discrimination or regard for race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, sexual or gender identity, national or ethnic origin, age, marital status, disability, genetic factors, military and veteran status, or any other characteristics protected by applicable local law.

**Eligibility:** All successful applicants must be eligible to work in the country the position is based.

**Assistance:** If you need assistance with completing the online application due to a disability, please send an accommodation request to accommodationrequest@dentsplysirona.com.

**Agencies:** Please note that Dentsply Sirona does not accept or respond to unsolicited requests or applications submitted by Recruitment Agencies/ Search Firms.

**Notice on Fraudulent Job Offers:** Unfortunately, we are aware of third parties that pretend to represent our company offering unauthorized employment opportunities. If you think a fraudulent source is offering you a job, please have a look at the following information: careers.dentsplysirona.com.

title: Jr Production Planner
description:
**Lincotek,** headquartered in Rubbiano, Parma, Italy, is a global contract manufacturer for services in markets including Industrial Gas Turbines, Aerospace and Medical Device applications, as well as a leading manufacturer of industrial coating equipment and one of the most respected producers in the Additive Manufacturing field. The Group has more than 1,800 employees located in 18 production facilities across Europe, North America and Asia.  

  



  

**Posizione:**
--------------

### **ABOUT THE JOB**


The Production Planner Junior coordinates the production schedule to meet customer demand, optimize resource utilization, and ensure on\-time delivery. This role coordinates across departments—including supply chain, manufacturing, procurement, and sales—to balance inventory levels, capacity, and lead times. The Planner uses forecasting data, sales trends, and production capabilities to


create efficient and achievable schedules while minimizing costs and ensuring high service levels.

### **JOB DESCRIPTION:**


1\. Develop and maintain production schedules based on customer orders and forecasted demand.

  

2\. Coordinate with various departments to ensure timely delivery of materials and resources needed for production.

  

3\. Monitor inventory levels to ensure optimal stock levels and prevent shortages or excesses.

  

4\. Collaborate with production team to identify and resolve any scheduling conflicts or issues.

  

5\. Analyze production data and make recommendations for process improvements or efficiency enhancements.

  

6\. Maintain accurate records of production schedules, inventory levels, and order fulfillment.

  

7\. Understand customer priorities and align with production to ensure company is meeting customer expectations

  

8\. Process and manage all order launched in SAP ERP and manages backlog report

  

9\. Coordinate with Shipping and Receiving on incoming orders and deliveries as requested by the customer

  

10\. Collaborate and communicate with departments to ensure finished goods are flowing to shipping area

  

11\. Collects all data necessary for invoice packages on outgoing orders

  

12\. Ability to work in a dynamic environment with changing priorities and critical deadlines

**Requisiti:**
--------------

### **EDUCATION AND/OR SKILLS:**


1\. High School or Bachelor's degree in supply chain management, business administration or any related fields.

  

2\. Strong analytical skills and problem\-solving skills

  

3\. Excellent organizational and time management skills.

  

4\. Proficient in using scheduling software, MS Office application and SAP Production.

  

5\. Proven experience as a production scheduler or in a similar role is preferable.

  

6\. Effective communication skills to collaborate with cross\-functional teams.

  

7\. Ability to learn and adapt to various operating systems and software

  

8\. Excellent attention to detail.

### **WORK ENVIRONMENT:**


This job operates in both an office environment and a manufacturing environment. The role routinely uses standard office equipment, such as computes, phones. The individual will be required to adhere to safety policies and procedures on the manufacturing floor.

### **PHYSICAL DEMAND:**


While performing the duties of this job, the employee is regularly required to talk or hear. The employee is frequently required to stand, walk, use hands to finger, handle or feel and reach with hands and arms.

### **POSITION TYPE/EXPECTED HOURS OF WORK:**


This is a full\-time position, Monday through Friday 8am to 5\.30pm, with additional hours as business needs necessitate.

### **TRAVEL**


Occasional overseas and domestic travel may be required to support the rapid growth of the company.
